kṣetrin a. [kṣetra-ini]
1 Owning a field; cultivating land.
2 Agricultural.
— m.
1 An agriculturist, a cultivator;  Y. 2. 161. 
2 A (nominal) husband;  Ś. 5. 
3 The soul.
4 The Supreme soul;  Bg. 13. 33.
